title: On Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2022 Results
text: On Holding AG announced strong 2022 full-year results with net sales of CHF 1,222.1 million, surpassing the CHF 1 billion mark for the first time in history and growing by 68.7% year-over-year. The company reported gross profit margin of 56.0%, net income of CHF 57.7 million, net income margin of 4.7%, and adjusted EBITDA margin of 13.5%. Q4 2022 net sales reached CHF 366.8 million, growing 91.9% year-over-year, driven by exceptional underlying full-price demand throughout the holiday season across regions and channels. Q4 2022 gross profit margin reached 58.5%, continuing sequential improvement over 2022 quarters and reflecting normalization of operations returning to sea freight as main mode of shipment. The strong Q4 performance capped a record year for On as it demonstrated its ability to deliver growth and profitability simultaneously.
